title: Blackspur BB-PD141 Iron Padlock
description: Product Description Blackspur iron padlock is manufactured with a brass finish and hardened steel shackle. It comes complete with 3 keys. Handy sizes great for travelling and holidays . Ideal for zip hole suitcase, laptop case, bags, lockers and tool box etc. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Padlock
